tools.name: Imperium Intelligence Pack Builder
tools.purpose_ru: Собирает лёгкий handoff pack: manifest, indexes, graph edges, SQLite index и selected source slices вместо crude repo dump.
tools.purpose_en: Builds lightweight handoff pack with manifest, indexes, graph edges, SQLite index, and selected source slices instead of crude repo dump.
tools.validation_recipe: python -m py_compile; build smoke pack; run Inquisition intelligence pack hygiene gate.
